name: FctsCustSvcTempLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_0 AS (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM(CSTK.CSSC_ID)) AS CSSC_ID, CSTK.CSTK_SEQ_NO AS CSTK_SEQ_NO, CSTK.CSTK_LAST_UPD_DTM AS CSTK_LAST_UPD_DTM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_CSTK_TASK CSTK WHERE CSTK.CSTK_LAST_UPD_DTM >= LEFT('@{pipeline().parameters.BeginDate}', 23) AND LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(CSTK.CSSC_ID))) <> 0) SELECT * FROM cte_0

Description:

CALLED BY:  FctsCustSvcPrerecSeq


PROCESSING:  Load Facets customer service driver table in Sybase tempdb with changed data based on input date parameter.

Annotations:
Load Customer Service driver table based on input date
Extract records with filter of  CSTK.CSTK_LAST_UPD_DTM >= '#BeginDate#'   and Len(Ltrim(Rtrim(CSTK.CSSC_ID))) <> 0
